name: ASUS ROG Thor 1200W Platinum III Hatsune Miku Edition Fully Modular Power Supply - 80 PLUS Platinum - ATX 3.1 - 135mm Dual Ball Bearing Fan - Magnetic OLED Display - 4x PCI-E 6+2-pin Connectors - PCI-E Gen 5.1 16-pin Cable (ROG-THOR-1200P3-MIKU)
shortName: ASUS ROG Thor 1200W Platinum III Hatsune Miku Edition Fully Modular
description: 1200W fully modular platinum power supply with OLED display and Hatsune Miku edition design, featuring ATX 3.1 and PCIe 5.1 support.
